channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 21st April
item.description:
Cw signage National speed and 40mph signs missing from post
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 21st April
item.description:
Nwd Damaged signs and post Need collecting from verge Will need a saw Give and take Enquiry raised to Ahr (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 21st April
item.description:
Cw Damaged posts and signs Will need replacing Nwd arrange for collection 21/4/26
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Dislodged manhole cover, 21st April
item.description:
When contractors were recently cutting the grass on the verge between 334 and 336 Hatherley Road, they dislodged a concrete manhole cover, which has been left partially open. It is too heavy to replace without some mechanical assistance. Please could you check this and close the cover. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 351, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 600x1080x50mm number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 21st April
item.description:
Perm repair required, has been made safe with barrier Broken / missing cover 900x600mm Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac around a manhole cover in road has worn away exposing metal rim near cover. Hole created sharp edge for car tyres., 21st April
item.description:
Not sure of area but near bus stop and on left hand side going towards hatherley road. Near right hand turning into Long Mynd avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Aysgarth Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very noisy manhole cover, 21st April
item.description:
Manhole cover opposite Waterloo Street Very noisy with the amount of cars going over it and getting worse. Also I have seen bikes and motorbikes trying to avoid. So far I've reported this 3 times and it's getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 266, Swindon Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 21st April
item.description:
Very large pothole in the road.
Report on FixMyStreet
